title: Process Engineer Vacancy at JK Tyre - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at JK Tyre - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? JK Tyre in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JK Tyre:
JK Tyre is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
